commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the voice-call realtime handler so OpenAI outbound initial greetings are folded into session instructions and explicit on-ready greetings remain enabled for non-OpenAI providers.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests +131. Total +159 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main queues an explicit initial greeting while the OpenAI provider sends create_response true by default, and the linked report includes repeated live outbound-call evidence. I did not run a live Twilio/OpenAI call in this read-only review.
